text: Tewang Kadamba Village is one of the Villages located in Katingan Regency, Central Kalimantan Province. In the Village there are many tribes, in terms of language it is in the form of Dayak Kaharingan and three religions to which residents of the Village adhere to are Hinduism, Islam and Christianity where Islam and Hindu Kaharingan are dominant religions. Seen from a religious perspective, although there are different religions, in the Village there is still an appreciation of differences between them. In terms of religious knowledge and worship enthusiasm in the Village, the problem faced is how to develop and increase religious understanding of the community in Tewang Kadamba Village. Therefore, the purpose of this research is to know and describe the Religious Understanding and how to get religious knowledge that is done by Regeneration and Cadre through a method of PAR (Participatory Action Research) which resulted in an understanding of religion and also knowledge of religion that can be attained by way of Education in School and also in the places of worship, and it is hoped that through Regeneration and Cadre will also be very effective in strengthening religion for the community of Tewang Kadamba Village.
